mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, role, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(user_id AS CHAR) FROM sys_user WHERE token = #{token} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT username FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
